Dialog.name: TOWNMAP_DETAIL_TEXT_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A private institute funded by the Kirijo Group that includes elementary, middle, and high school. Established in 1982, with the building rebuilt since.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TOWNMAP_DETAIL_TEXT_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Formerly a hotel, renovated as a dormitory for Gekkoukan High students. Unlike other school dorms, it is inhabited by both boys and girls.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TOWNMAP_DETAIL_TEXT_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A large mall located in the vast shopping area in the northern part of Port Island.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TOWNMAP_DETAIL_TEXT_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The last stop of the passenger train Anehazuru. One of the two entryways to Port Island.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TOWNMAP_DETAIL_TEXT_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A strip mall built at Iwatodai Station, the connecting station of the local train line and the monorail.[n]{f 1 1}
